prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热，江南大学在计算机、自动化、人工智能等热门工科专业均有布局；河北省物理类考生数从 2021 年 21.6 万增至 2025 年 36.3 万，持续大幅增长；2026 年全省普通高考总人数约 60.98 万，按近年物理类占比约 60% 估算约 36.6 万人，较 2025 年微增，竞争压力维持高位；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对河北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北省招生规模较大（物理类近 200 人），属于省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次异常后移后的回调压力、2026 年计划微缩及考生规模高位持平等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次较 2025 年略有前移（更易进），但受限于考生规模庞大和热门专业竞争，回调幅度有限。预测最低位次约 34865 名，区间 34365–35365 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 29403→25269→27571→26440→35284. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 8844 places, the largest fluctuation in the past five years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 35284. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 170→167→178→186→193 students, showing a continuous slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 191 students, a slight decrease of 2 students (about -1%) compared to 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising, from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a university management incident), but the 2026 reputation file has no direct negative records. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71/106 (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are both top-tier nationally. Corresponding enrollment majors include Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, and Light Chemical Engineering. The flagship disciplines strongly attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular. Jiangnan University offers programs in popular engineering fields like Computer Science, Automation, and Artificial Intelligence. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province increased from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025, showing continuous significant growth. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 60%, roughly 366,000 people, a slight increase from 2025, maintaining high competitive pressure. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hebei Province (nearly 200 students in the Physics Category), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound pressure after the abnormal ranking drop in 2025, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, and the sustained high number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. However, due to the large number of examinees and competition for popular majors, the rebound is limited. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34865, with a range of 34365–35365.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (34365–35365), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<34365), prioritize popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Automation, as well as the flagship Food Science and Engineering (A+). For rankings in the middle of the range, focus on moderate Tier 2 majors. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (>35365), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to potential opportunities from enrollment expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2769→2445→2880→2651→3215, with significant fluctuations in recent three years. In 2025, the ranking shifted backward by about 564 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3215. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 31→34→28→25→20 students, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 27 students, a substantial increase of 7 students (+35%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising, from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to university management incidents), but in 2026, there were no direct negative records in reputation documents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71/106 (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure. No obvious records of enrollment gaps. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are top-tier programs, but they are not directly relevant to liberal arts students. Liberal arts majors mainly include economics, management, law, and literature, with no separate discipline evaluation ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively popular, while Accounting/Finance/Auditing show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes. The number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province increased from 202,000 in 2021 to 244,000 in 2025, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 609,800, with History Category accounting for about 40% in recent years, estimated at about 244,000, roughly the same as 2025. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Hebei liberal arts students. The university's enrollment scale for History Category in Hebei is small (20–30 students), so plan fluctuations significantly impact rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the substantial 35% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the roughly stable number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift significantly backward (harder to enter) compared to 2025, but the large expansion will ease actual competition, limiting the extent of the backward shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3501, with a range of 3001–4001.
